summary_one_line: Input must be a valid font carrying a 'morx' AAT table so c->plan->apply_morx is true.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed sfnt/TrueType font whose table directory contains a 'morx' AAT-layout table (4-byte tag 0x6d6f7278), so the shape plan sets apply_morx and the true branch at line 1082 is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seed 1 (vpc, trial 1) begins with the OTTO sfnt magic and the literal ASCII tag 'morx' at offset 0x0c; the line-1082 true side is hit only by W (W T=42 F=0 vs L T=0 F=190) and only the W role reaches the apply_morx-guarded call at line 1083.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All value_profile loser-blocking seeds lack the 'morx' tag (seed 1 contains an unrelated 'y-hant-hk' string, others are short non-font blobs), so apply_morx stays false and the branch resolves only on the false side (L T=0 F=190).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which copies the intercepted 4-byte CMP operand for the table-tag comparison directly into the input at the matching offset, planting the exact 'morx' tag; value_profile has no I2SRandReplace and must blunder onto the 4-byte literal via havoc, which it never does in 10 trials.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked true side guards a morx-dependent call inside hb_ot_position_plan.
The winner takes the true side at line 1082 while the loser only takes the false side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1082  T=42 F=0  T=0 F=190  if (c->plan->apply_morx)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Only the winner role reaches the apply_morx-guarded call at line 1083.
A winner-resolving seed contains the literal ASCII 'morx' tag and the sfnt magic.
A loser-blocking seed carries an unrelated string rather than a morx table tag.
value_profile_cmplog has I2SRandReplace while value_profile does not.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and uses only havoc plus token mutators.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5736 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed ae73a8c9233c3cb8` and observed exactly one I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 18 of the 19-level ancestor chain (ancestor e0a5b09f80625fb6), confirming an unwrapped I2S find in the vpc lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose apply_morx flag is gated by a 4-byte 'morx' table-tag CMP where value_profile resolves the branch as often as value_profile_cmplog within the trial budget.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte diff is noisy with no single concentrated 4-byte morx run shared across all winner seeds, so the I2S target offset for the tag comparison is inferred from one seed rather than from a tight cross-seed consensus.
